item.title: Paranormal writer David Wilcock voiced financial worries before death
item.description: Police say Wilcock was battling serious financial issues prior to his death.

item.title: Smokey Robinson's $500M countersuit against accusers partially dismissed
item.description: Los Angeles judge trims legal claims in ongoing sexual-assault civil suit.

item.title: Grindr exec says Trump admin officials interested in D.C. party
item.description: White House Correspondents' Dinner weekend bash draws high-level interest.

item.title: 'Storage Wars' to honor Darrell Sheets with in-memoriam during new episode
item.description: A&E will pay tribute to late cast member during weekend broadcast.

item.title: 'Deadliest Catch' to pay tribute to late deckhand Todd Meadows in new season
item.description: Show will address death of rookie deckhand but won't show footage of incident.
